name: send_email_notification
description: Render structured sections into HTML and send the email. Pass sections (not pre-rendered HTML). The tool handles rendering and sending in one step.

recipient.description: The email address of the recipient

agent_type.description: The type of agent that processed the request

sections.description: Array of section objects with type and data (e.g. executive_summary, status_box, resource_list, next_steps, alert, code_block, bullet_list)

student_email.description: Optional student email for attachment filename

attachment_content.description: Optional content to include as a text file attachment

course_code.description: Course code for the email header

message_id.description: Optional Gmail message ID for metadata

student_config_id.description: Optional student config ID for metadata
